title: Reconcile statement evidence to a canonical transaction
preconditions: The statement row was parsed and approved outside LEDGER; the account and statement scope are valid; the caller supplies evidence identity, candidate facts, deterministic-policy identity, and idempotency identity.
postconditions: The statement row produces at most one canonical transaction effect; a strong match preserves one existing transaction, a zero-match creates one statement-only transaction, and ambiguity remains unapplied.
main_flow: 1. Tally registers or reuses the statement evidence and exposes compatible unreconciled candidates through the public reconciliation projection. 2. The caller submits the deterministic outcome and match basis. 3. Tally independently validates candidate compatibility, uniqueness, policy identity, lifecycle, and existing evidence links. 4. For one valid strong match, Tally links statement evidence to the existing transaction and records a deterministic reconciliation decision. 5. For no compatible prior transaction, an approved request atomically creates one statement-only canonical transaction and links the evidence. 6. For multiple compatible candidates, Tally appends an ambiguous outcome without linking or creating a transaction. 7. For accepted evidence that conflicts with canonical facts or an active confirmation, Tally appends a reconciliation exception without linking or creating a transaction. 8. Tally returns the resulting state and durable decision or exception reference.
alt_flows: 1a. Statement evidence replay is identical -> return the existing outcome with no duplicate effect
2a. Policy or match basis is missing or unsupported -> reject automatic application
3a. Candidate facts conflict, candidate is inactive, or evidence is linked elsewhere -> return exception without mutation
4a. More than one compatible candidate exists -> return ambiguous and do not guess
5a. Statement-only creation fails -> commit neither transaction nor evidence link
6a. Same key requests a different outcome -> return conflict and preserve the original
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"INGEST submits one accepted statement-row evidence record and its approved statement scope for reconciliation.","status":"draft"}
